name: srd
description: [DEPRECATED at v1.23.0 — consolidated into the sulis plugin at v0.37.0] Requirements Analyst functionality now lives at /sulis:codebase-mapping, /sulis:critical-thinking, /sulis:requirements-validation, /sulis:index-specifications, /sulis:requirements-templates, /sulis:map-architecture with the requirements-analyst agent in plugins/sulis/agents/. Marketplace-wide standards (Founder English, Repository Contract, PR Hygiene, Change Work, Convention Preference, etc.) now live at plugins/sulis/references/. This plugin shell remains for marketplace compatibility; no new development. See plugins/sulis/CHANGELOG.md v0.37.0 for the consolidation narrative.
